Additionally, no editor or translator is named despite this being an anthology of classical comedies by Plautus and Titus Maccius Plautus/Terence — a missing person flag could apply, but since the entry appears to treat this as a collected edition without specifying an editor, api_concerned is set instead. The publisher 'BG Donauland' likely refers to the Buchgemeinschaft Donauland book club edition.
